summary: Completed full-stack testing of Dashboard GRC (Iteration 21 - Fase 2 backend + Fase 3 frontend). 12/12 pytest backend tests passed covering GET /api/dashboard/data (with/without filters), GET/POST/DELETE /api/dashboard/vistas (CRUD with uniqueness validation). Frontend at /dashboard-grc loads correctly with all components: 4 KPI cards, Matriz 5x5 with static colors and dynamic counters, drill-down modal opens with hallazgos list, Panel Severidad horizontal bar chart, Top 5 Dominios stacked bars, Filtros Globales (5 multi-select dropdowns), and Vistas Guardadas dropdown with create/apply/delete functionality.

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' originating from RiskMatrix component - needs unique keys in mapped cells
Recharts warning: width(-1) height(-1) on initial render before container size is computed - cosmetic only, charts render correctly afterwards
Accessibility warning: DialogContent missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for the drill-down modal

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/dashboard/data returns full structure (kpis, matriz_5x5, panel_severidad, top_dominios, filtros_aplicados, opciones_filtros)
Backend GET /api/dashboard/data with estados_vuln, estados_hall query params filters correctly and echoes filtros_aplicados
Backend GET /api/dashboard/data with dominios filter works
Backend GET /api/dashboard/data requires auth (401/403 without token)
Backend GET /api/dashboard/vistas returns user + public vistas as array
Backend POST /api/dashboard/vistas creates vista and persists (verified via GET)
Backend POST /api/dashboard/vistas rejects duplicate name per user (400)
Backend POST /api/dashboard/vistas updates existing vista when 'id' is in body (verified name, informes_seleccionados, filtros)
Backend POST /api/dashboard/vistas public vista duplicate name rejected
Backend DELETE /api/dashboard/vistas/{id} removes vista and is verified absent on GET
Frontend renders 4 KPI cards (vulnerabilidades-activas, hallazgos-abiertos, indice-de-exposicion, riesgo-total-hallazgos)
Frontend renders 25 matrix cells (5x5) with static colors and numeric counts
Frontend clicking non-empty matrix cell opens drill-down modal showing list of hallazgos with codigo/estado/riesgo
Frontend Vistas Guardadas dropdown opens and shows existing user vistas, 'Sin Vista (Limpiar)' and 'Guardar Vista Actual' option
Frontend Filtros Globales section visible with 5 multi-select dropdowns
Frontend Panel de Severidad and Top 5 Dominios charts render with data
action_items: Optional: Add unique `key` prop to mapped cells inside RiskMatrix component to silence React key warning
Optional: Wrap Recharts ResponsiveContainer with proper minWidth/minHeight or remove pre-render warnings (cosmetic)
Optional: Add a DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to the matrix drill-down DialogContent for a11y compliance
critical_code_review_comments: routes/dashboard.py: 'creado_por' field is read on PUT/DELETE assuming it always exists - acceptable since insert always sets it.
DashboardVistaUpdate Pydantic model is declared but not used; POST endpoint uses raw dict. Consider switching to typed model for stronger validation.
_get_filter_options hardcodes estados_vulnerabilidad and estados_hallazgo lists - acceptable but should align with single source of truth used elsewhere in the app.
Recharts charts inside DashboardGRC initialize with width=-1/height=-1 due to container size not yet computed; consider providing explicit dimensions or skipping render until container has size.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_dashboard_grc.py (new pytest suite for Dashboard GRC endpoints)
seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own TEST_-prefixed vistas and cleans them up via DELETE afterwards. No persistent test data left over.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard GRC (Fase 2 + 3) is fully functional: backend endpoints /api/dashboard/data and /api/dashboard/vistas (GET/POST/DELETE) work with auth + uniqueness validations. Frontend /dashboard-grc has data-testid selectors: 'dashboard-grc', 'kpi-*', 'matrix-cell-{prob}-{imp}', 'vistas-dropdown', 'refresh-btn', 'save-view-name-input', 'confirm-save-view-btn'. Matrix drill-down opens a modal on cell click (only when count > 0). Minor non-blocking warnings exist (React key prop in RiskMatrix, Recharts dimensions, Dialog a11y) - safe to leave or fix later.
